name: Ripple Role — MAJOR_GATED Classification
description: Evaluates whether the Ripple role classifies a blocking drift that escalates into the PRD and architecture spec as MAJOR_GATED, requiring operator approval before drafting and before merge.
needs_llm: Judging that a drift is blocking and crosses into the highest canonical layers requires semantic understanding of the PRD/arch-spec scope.

eval_cases.provenance: WORKFLOW.md §4.5 (Ripple — MAJOR_GATED, blocking + higher-layer escalation); idc:idc-skill-ripple-verdict

parts.text: A pillar at docs/plans/pillars/fixture-auth-drift-pillar.md moves all user authentication from first-party sessions to a third-party identity provider. The Phase 1 PRD (docs/prd/fixture-prd.md) mandates first-party auth, and the change forces an architecture-spec rewrite of the trust boundary; the phase cannot proceed until the operator rules. Classify the drift severity, give the verdict, and tell me the approval posture.

rubric.criterion: Classifies the blocking, PRD+arch-spec-escalating drift as MAJOR_GATED (not NO_RIPPLE / MINOR_AUTONOMOUS / GATED)
Drafts a change order naming the PRD section and arch-spec impact, and states operator approval is required before drafting AND before merge (never auto-merges)
Does not write (or propose writing) source, tests, or tracker state
